section.title: Contact
section.subtitle: Contact and Collaboration Gateway
section.description: Structured contact pathways for research collaboration, development work, internships, thesis supervision, publication outputs, and general HUMACH Research communication.

summary.label: Gateway
summary.headline: Research · Development · Internship · Collaboration
summary.description: Use this page to choose the right pathway, include the right context, and connect with HUMACH Research.

inquiries.title: Research Collaboration
inquiries.summary: For AI, computing, health, signal processing, data science, education technology, or human-centered systems research.

inquiries.title: Development Project
inquiries.summary: For dashboards, web systems, AI prototypes, research automation tools, and deployable software workflows.

inquiries.title: Internship or Student Pathway
inquiries.summary: For research internships, development internships, thesis projects, student supervision, and guided contribution roles.

inquiries.title: Publication or Output Contribution
inquiries.summary: For articles, technical reports, datasets, software papers, documentation, and reproducible research outputs.

inquiries.title: General Inquiry
inquiries.summary: For general questions about HUMACH Research, collaboration possibilities, website content, or future directions.

methods.title: General Email
methods.summary: Use the main HUMACH email for research, development, and collaboration questions.
methods.label: contact@humachresearch.org

methods.title: Join Form
methods.summary: Use the application form for internships, student roles, and contributor pathways.
methods.label: Open Join Form

methods.title: Project Directory
methods.summary: Explore current project directions before proposing a contribution.
methods.label: View Projects

methods.title: Opportunities Page
methods.summary: Review internship, thesis, research assistant, and collaboration pathways.
methods.label: View Opportunities

routes.title: Research Partner
routes.summary: Develop studies, experiments, papers, datasets, or grant ideas.

routes.title: Development Partner
routes.summary: Build dashboards, tools, prototypes, web systems, and AI-powered workflows.

routes.title: Student Contributor
routes.summary: Join through internships, thesis projects, or guided research/development tasks.

routes.title: Publication Contributor
routes.summary: Contribute to articles, reports, software papers, datasets, or technical documentation.

process.title: Choose Pathway
process.summary: Select whether the inquiry is for research, development, internship, publication, or collaboration.

process.title: Share Context
process.summary: Send your goal, background, skills, preferred timeline, and expected contribution.

process.title: Match Direction
process.summary: Connect the inquiry to a research area, project, development task, or opportunity pathway.

process.title: Start Contribution
process.summary: Define the first task, expected output, supervision model, and communication routine.
